title: What does the Golden Compass do in Slay the Spire 2?
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
What does the Golden Compass do? If you've just started Act 2 and you're offered the Golden Compass as a helping hand to get you started, here's what you can expect from the item and why you should choose it.

Unlike the Lantern Key or Colossal Flower event, the Golden Compass offers little downside, apart from picking it over items that can benefit your deck. It's definitely worth weighing up where you are on your Slay the Spire 2 run and just how the Golden Compass can guide you and your party - if you're playing multiplayer - to the end of Act 2.

Read the rest of the story...
